name: UBA : User Geography Map
notes: A match indicates that a user logged in remotely from a country that is different from the country of the user’s last remote login. This rule might also indicate an account compromise, particularly if the rule matches occurred closely in time.
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
when any of Username is the key and any of Source Geographic Country/Region is the value in any of UBA : Users Last Country - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Geography Map on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
AND NOT when any of Username is the key and any of Source Geographic Country/Region is the value in any of UBA : Users Last Country - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Add the "userName" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "UBA : User Geography Change"
Add "sourceGeographic" to Reference Map: "UBA : Users Last Country" with key "userName"
